steps.instruction: Tap on the button that says exactly 'Share Branch Link'. Do not tap on 'Native Share Branch Link'. Do not scroll.

Wait up to 5 seconds for a share sheet or share menu to appear on the screen. Look for sharing options like 'Bluetooth', 'Quick Share', 'Copy link', or similar share actions. If a share sheet is visible, succeed. If not, fail the test.
Press the back button or tap outside the share sheet to dismiss it. Succeed when the share sheet is closed and the main screen is visible again.
